name: DebridHub
description: Replaces the *arr stack: direct streaming via self-refreshing .strm files, batch downloads, Torznab search, a watchlist, a Seerr/Jellyseerr request webhook, and a library organizer.
overview: Stream and batch-download from Real-Debrid / AllDebrid inside Jellyfin.

versions.changelog: Fixes episode durations reading as zero (and episodes being wrongly marked watched) after scanning large season packs. Torrent info is now cached per torrent instead of fetched once per file - a 300-file pack made 300 identical API calls during a scan and tripped Real-Debrid rate limiting. Resolved links are cached for 6 hours, and rate-limit responses now back off and retry instead of failing.
